text:
(insert any cao warning notices or other necessary warning notices)

RECITALS

The position of the parties at this hearing were:

[insert]

[The court handed down judgment on [date] and made the findings in the schedule to this order.] / [The court gave an oral judgment on [date] and made the findings in the schedule to this order.]

[The court found threshold pursuant to s.31(2) Children Act 1989 proved in accordance with the findings in the schedule to this order.]

[Insert any other necessary recitals]

IT IS ORDERED [BY CONSENT] THAT:

Final orders

[Name of child(ren)] [is] / [are] placed in the care of the local authority.

The local authority is authorised to place [name of child(ren)] for adoption. The consent of [name] to the making of a placement order is dispensed with on the ground that the welfare of the child[ren] requires that their consent be dispensed with.

[Names] are directed to keep the court and the local authority informed of their addresses and contact details.  If they do not do so, service may be effected by post to their last known addresses. Such service may be deemed to be sufficient notice of any subsequent adoption proceedings and hearings within them.

[Name of child(ren)] [is] / [are] put under the supervision of the local authority until [date].

The child[ren] shall live with [name(s)].

[Name(s)] must make sure that the child[ren] spend[s] time or otherwise [has] [have] contact with [name] as follows: [insert].

[Name] [is] / [are] appointed special guardian[s] of [name of child(ren)].

The [local authority having withdrawn their application, the] court makes no order.

Involving the child[ren]

[Name] must explain the outcome of this hearing to the child[ren].

[Name] must give the child[ren] a copy of the [letter from the judge] / [summary of reasons for this order] when explaining the outcome of this hearing to the child[ren].

(include where a care order or placement order has been made)

Transcript
